description: Content that emphasizes specific Riyadh locations and venues in F&B posts, using location pins and landmark references to drive local relevance and discoverability.
structural_recipe: Lead with a business or restaurant name in Arabic and English. Include a precise Riyadh location reference (landmark, university, district, or exit number) with 📍 emoji. Credit the photographer or content source with @mention. Describe the menu items, offerings, or unique features. Use clear Arabic-English bilingual captions to maximize reach across audiences.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value local specificity and easy navigation to venues. Tagging exact locations (King Saud University, Section B, exit numbers) enables direct sharing and word-of-mouth amplification. Bilingual captions honor Arabic cultural preference while enabling international visitors to engage. Location tags increase discoverability in local searches and social proof through venue-based community clustering.
transplantation_caveats: Riyadh-specific references may not translate to other Saudi cities without adaptation
Location accuracy is critical; incorrect landmark references damage credibility in local communities
Exit numbers and district names vary; verify current local nomenclature before posting
cultural_constraints: Always include Arabic as primary language; English is secondary support
Respect location privacy and operational hours when featuring venues
Verify business permission before tagging or featuring on location
